summary: Core frontend components for creating, listing, filtering, and expanding mod ideas were added, along with React Query hooks and a workshop-themed Tailwind design. However, the backend implementation does not meet key persistence and validation requirements (no stable storage, no reverse-chronological guarantee, no clear error results), and it appears to not actually store created ideas due to use of an immutable List binding. Additionally, some authentication/actor hook changes and an extra backend endpoint were introduced without being requested and may violate the immutablePaths constraint.

missing_requirements.requirement: Persist mod ideas in canister stable state across upgrades/restarts.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo defines in-memory variables only; there is no stable var usage nor any upgrade hooks (preupgrade/postupgrade).

missing_requirements.requirement: Return list of mod ideas in reverse-chronological order (newest first) via a canister method.
missing_requirements.reason: backend getAllModIdeas simply converts the list to an array without sorting/reversing; newest-first is only implemented in the frontend query sorting.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend rejects invalid payloads (e.g., empty title or empty description) with a clear error result.
missing_requirements.reason: createModIdea returns async Nat and performs no validation; there is no Result/error type or trapping with a clear message for invalid title/description.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a backend method to fetch a single mod idea by id (getModIdea), including trapping when not found.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asked for create and list APIs; single-item fetch was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/changed authentication/actor hook behavior using React Query + Internet Identity integration logic (actor recreation/invalidation on identity change).
hallucinated_features.reason: Authentication changes were not requested, and the BuildRequest explicitly forbids editing frontend files under immutablePaths such as frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts(x) and frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts.
